must_detect.matched_text: Proposed acquisition of a 21.5% equity interest in Riverpeak New Energy Co., Ltd. (USCC: 91F2X0000K8W123Q7Y, fictional) for approximately RMB 1.2 billion; signing of the definitive Share Purchase Agreement targeted for 2026-06-28, long-stop 2026-10-31.

MAC/MAE: parties acknowledge that sector index volatility, seasonal demand shifts, or pandemics shall not constitute a Material Adverse Effect (negated MAC); closing is conditioned on no MAE arising from target-specific compliance failures.

Financing: mix of internal cash and a committed RMB term facility; covenants include financial reporting under PRC GAAP and “no dividend leakage” before closing; hedging plan to be approved by Treasury.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: IR draft must not be released before 2026-07-15 09:00 CST
Proposed acquisition of a 21.5% equity interest
maintain an “内幕信息知情人” list
circulate materials via the sealed data room
do not email summaries outside legal/compliance
only refer to the transaction using the codename
no selective disclosure to analysts or suppliers before T-0
as an A-share issuer, the company must pre-clear any interviews and wechat posts with the exchange
no data relating to minors under 14 is collected in this project
CAC cross-border data transfer security assessment required for any export of R&D telemetry or HR files (PIPL/CSL/DSL)
execute SCCs and complete CAC申报 prior to transfer

Proposed acquisition of a 21.5% equity interest in Riverpeak New Energy Co., Ltd. (USCC: 91F2X0000K8W123Q7Y, fictional) for approximately RMB 1.2 billion; signing of the definitive Share Purchase Agreement targeted for 2026-06-28, long-stop 2026-10-31.

MAC/MAE: parties acknowledge that sector index volatility, seasonal demand shifts, or pandemics shall not constitute a Material Adverse Effect (negated MAC); closing is conditioned on no MAE arising from target-specific compliance failures.

Financing: mix of internal cash and a committed RMB term facility; covenants include financial reporting under PRC GAAP and “no dividend leakage” before closing; hedging plan to be approved by Treasury.

_label_note: CN Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered CN public-service-line phone bait, educational insider-list/information-barrier bait, training term-sheet samples, negated material-adverse-change prose, and checksum-valid Resident ID/USCC/mobile/passport positives. Generated checksum-invalid Resident ID/USCC labels were removed from strict must_detect.

_agent_review.notes: Reconciled CN Stage A strict labels to current deterministic strict-mode findings after manual review of raw auto-label mismatches, checksum-invalid Resident ID/USCC labels, public-service-line phone bait, educational insider-list/information-barrier wording, training term-sheet samples, and negated MAC wording; retained non-deterministic statutory/coverage targets in ideal_must_detect.
